reviews.author: Han Nguyen
reviews.text: There are 2 routes to get to the summit. First, take the cable car to the pagoda and then have a short hiking in trail and paved staircase. The second way is hiking along the power pole that is not too challenging, take abt 3 hours and offers a great experience. Keep in mind, there are no shops on the top, so if you want to camp overnight, you must bring everything by yourself.

reviews.author: Kerin Jellias
reviews.text: I’m so in love with this spot. We drove here by motorcycle and started climbing by the electrical-poles trail. It takes me 4hrs from the starting point to the top. We camped on the top overnight and this was the most amazing experience for me during the month. The view is spectacular for both sunset and sunrise.

reviews.author: Skye Tran
reviews.text: The view is amazing and worth the way but it's not very easy. Prepare your own water for the climb if you are not going up by the steps, you can only find water once you get to the top and the temperature is very high there without any shades at some point. You can camp on top if you bring your own tent, it's quite cool to try.

reviews.author: Sven Ng
reviews.text: Go past pole 147 and do not enter military post, go around it walk down small valley then you will see the top of the moutain

reviews.author: Minh Trung Huỳnh
reviews.text: Cool hiking spot. Very easy to experience mountain hiking. The place is wild. The peak is in reach within avg. of 3 hours hiking. There is a camping spot, which is very comfortable since it is covered in tall trees. You can have your BBQ or whatever food you bringing. From said camping spot, you need to left (from your hiking up perspective) to reach the top. You will see a small range of flora, yet beautiful and special species. The top of the mountain is picturesque, you would spend a day to get all the photos. At this height, you can see lands with a unique view. Trees don't lock your vision, yet they don't provide much shade. Thus you may need sunscreen. It was a very fun exp. for me. Would like to come back sometimes.

reviews.author: yoomat6
reviews.text: I share information of how to get here from Saigon without own vehicles. First, you take whatever bus to go to Long Khanh City fr Saigon. Next, you take a van operated by Kim Manh Hung bus company in Long Khanh. The bus station is closed to Long Khanh train station. The van takes you to Xuon Loc intersection. From there, you take a taxi to get to the entrance of mountain. At the entrance, you can choose you walk up whole route or use cable car to the middle of mountain and climb up the rest. It takes around 1hour from cable car station to the top of the mountain. It is rocky mountain but easy to climb because of the proper trail. On the top of mountain, there r remains of the military base. I found several holes from bomb attacks. Many Vietnam people seems to stay over the night in the tent.

reviews.author: Minh Tuấn
reviews.text: Second highest mountain in the southern of Vietnam. It is easier to get to the peak here than in Black Virgin Mountain (Núi Bà Đen). The view is still wild because there are not many people getting there compare to Black Virgin Mountain. There are beautiful spots for camping ⛺. In the morning you can watch sunrise, flowing clouds. Please don't forget to collect your leftover after camping, I don't want to see it getting dirtier and dirtier like Black Virgin Mountain.

reviews.author: Du Du
reviews.text: It will take you 3 hrs to get the peak but it is worth to view amazing and beautiful landscape..

reviews.author: Trung Nguyen
reviews.text: The best place for hiking and camping in Southern Việt Nam . High recommend

reviews.author: Thomas Hornschuh
reviews.text: Night hike to Gia Lao Started friday afternoon from Ho Chi Minh with motorcycle towards trail headand hiked overnight to skip the heat during the day. Paid only a parking fee and hiked all the way up in 2hours. The first steps are steep but you will pass vendors and in case you can get food and drinks there. We brought all for BBQ with us and camping gear of course. There is nothing scary on this hike, half way you even have a check point for rest or boil water. Don't forget your flash light and if you unsure what way to go just follow the electricity cabel going up to Gia Lao. If u feel lazy take the cabel car running during the day and skip torturous steps.

reviews.author: Daniel
reviews.text: Nice hike to the top, climbed up in 3 hours, camped on top and went the other side down.

reviews.author: Cong-Thang HUYNH
reviews.text: Nice to go trekking and inhale more O2 to our lung

reviews.author: Gamlet Orudzhaliev
reviews.text: Nice views, 4 hour path from the beginning till the end

reviews.author: Leynard Theseira
reviews.text: This was a nice challenging mountain to hike. It took us about 2 hours to climb up. There is a military building at the top so if you need help, they can assist. Some lovely views from the top of the mountain. This is a popular camping destination, just be ready to carry up your tent and equipment. There is also a cable car, which will take you up to a point where there is a temple. From there you can hike up about 45 minutes to the top.

reviews.author: Ngân Trần
reviews.text: Wonderful view on the top. Worth going for a weekened getaway.

reviews.author: Tin Ngo
reviews.text: Great place for relax, Total 6,5km for go and down

reviews.author: Manh Nguyen
reviews.text: Suitable place for camping on weekends with friend and family

reviews.author: vu phuong
reviews.text: Nice mountain for climbing and outside activities, no trash, fresh air

reviews.author: Phước Dương Thành
reviews.text: A really high mountain with lots of places to visit and activities to join. The scenery is stunning.

reviews.author: Windy Dan
reviews.text: Amazing! The best feeling when you go through all of those forests and rocks and touch the top. Perfect!

reviews.author: Ngoc Hoang
reviews.text: Wonderful place. Quite easy to go trekking. Magnificient sunset.

reviews.author: Tờ Rí Phạm
reviews.text: Great idea for hiking in the weekend near by SG as well

reviews.author: Hon Ung
reviews.text: Let's conquer the top, 847 meter of this mountain. Worth to explore.
